retrieved_result: Phenylketonuria Description Phenylketonuria (commonly known as PKU) is an inherited disorder that increases the levels of a substance called phenylalanine in the blood. Phenylalanine is a building block of proteins ( an amino acid) that is obtained through the diet. It is found in all proteins and in some artificia
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result describes Phenylketonuria (PKU), a medical condition, and has no content related to easy DIY room decoration ideas. It is not relevant to the query.
